content: Phase 1: Fix bug — Last polished item stuck on 'Polishing photo…'
Backend: Change $unset thumbnail_data_url to $set null in _run_background_matte so polled GET response propagates correctly through frontend upsert merge
Frontend (closetStore.upsert): Defensive — clear stale thumbnail_data_url when polled item has clean_image_status='ready'
Frontend (Closet.jsx): Robust polling — use live snapshot via closetStore.getSnapshot(), cap polling lifetime, force incrementalSync as last-resort fallback
Phase 2: Cross-page 'Analysis in progress' floating progress bar
Phase 2: Wire AddItem analyze flow to workStore.registerAnalyze/updateAnalyze/completeAnalyze
Phase 2: Wire AddItem save flow to workStore.registerPolishItems for pending-matte items
Phase 3: Global 'Polishing photos' progress bar + completion toast (replaces per-card badge)
Phase 3: Replace per-card 'Polishing photo…' Badge with subtle pulse ring overlay (global floater takes over textual progress)
Phase 3: Register Closet-discovered pending items with workStore so floater + toast also cover reload scenarios
Final testing via testing agent (backend + frontend)
